name: odop-marketplace
description: One District One Product - E-commerce Platform for Indian Artisans

scripts.seed:bulk: cd backend && node seeds/000_import_csv.js && node seeds/run.js && node seeds/002_bulk_data.js
scripts.seed:all: cd backend && node seeds/000_import_csv.js && node seeds/run.js && node seeds/002_bulk_data.js

scripts.setup:db: npm run migrate && npm run seed
